case_title: KATHERINE HOFF VS. SO YOUN CHUONG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOFF, KATHERINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHUONG, SO YOUN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KATHERINE HOFF & DEFENDANT SO YOUN CHUONG, WHO WAS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN SPEAKING INTERPRETER, TED KIM. DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND, GARY GHOUNG, WAS ALSO PRESENT AND TESTIFIED AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
RETURNED MAIL: MOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,810.00 FILED BY HOFF, KATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUONG, SO YOUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HOFF, KATHERINE
